# Modular Design in R

This repository contains the materials for the [Odum
Institute](https://odum.unc.edu) Modular Design with R course. The
[slides are also
available](https://projects.indicatrix.org/odum-modular-design-r).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`market_shares()`](http://projects.indicatrix.org/OdumModularDesignRSP26/reference/market_shares.md)
  : Compute market shares in an airport or city

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Market
  share](http://projects.indicatrix.org/OdumModularDesignRSP26/articles/market_shares.md):
